headings.usage: Use tight letter spacing (tracking-tighter) for massive text. Never use Inter for headings.

body.usage: Data-heavy tables, forms, logs, and general reading content.

colors.rules: Color is functional. Keep the dashboard 90% monochrome (zinc/black), reserving the Cyan/Pink for AI agent status glows, confidence rings, and the footer aurora.

layouts.spacing_scale: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use p-6 or p-8 inside bordered containers. Ensure grid items don't collide.
layouts.dashboard_grid: High Density Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12). gap-6 between modules.
layouts.agent_bento: Bento Grid specifically for the Agents tab. Use col-span-4 for the Agent Status Card, col-span-8 for the Live Task Stream.

surfaces.dashboard_cards: Grid Borders ('The Technical Look'). Flat background (bg-zinc-900), 1px border (border-white/10), no soft shadows. Raw, objective data presentation.
surfaces.glassmorphism: Used EXCLUSIVELY for floating overlays (like the gradient-menu). bg-zinc-950/60 with backdrop-blur-xl and a delicate 1px border-white/10.

components.gradient_menu: A horizontal pill menu floating at the top (fixed, z-50). Default state: solid text, dark glass bg. Hover state: expands width slightly via motion, text transitions to bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-cyan-400 to-pink-500, with a subtle outer glow.
components.motion_footer: Cinematic scroll-reveal footer. Must include: 1) Aurora glow (absolute blur-[120px] cyan/pink blobs behind content), 2) Giant background text 'ACOS' (text-[15vw] font-black text-white/5 tracking-tighter), 3) GSAP/Framer marquee of system statuses, 4) Magnetic-style CTA buttons.
components.agent_status_board: Multi-agent dashboard showing confidence indicators (circular progress rings), current handoff state, and live execution timeline.

motion.micro_interactions: All buttons need hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-95 transitions.
motion.page_transitions: Staggered fade-in (framer-motion) for dashboard grid cards.
motion.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee or framer-motion for the agent task stream and footer. Slow, continuous flow.
motion.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Do not rely exclusively on color/motion to convey agent failure/success.

media.rules: Do NOT use placeholder image URLs. Images used must be from the verified list below.

libraries.charts: recharts (for analytics and agent confidence rings)

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case, role-based format (e.g. data-testid='agent-status-toggle').

instructions_to_main_agent: Write code in .js / .jsx files (not .tsx) as per the workspace environment.
Ensure dark mode is the default and strictly implemented. Do not use pure #000000; stick to the zinc scale.
Do not use generic centered layouts or standard Bootstrap-like grids.

The gradient-menu must be built as a horizontal floating pill, utilizing backdrop-blur-xl and transparent backgrounds correctly so content scrolling underneath remains visible but the menu is highly legible.

The motion-footer must act as a grand, cinematic conclusion to the app layout. Use an absolute background with high blur for the aurora glow, giant tracking-tighter text for 'ACOS', and a continuous marquee.
Every module (HR, Finance, Inventory) should feel like a 'Command Center' - dense grids, border-collapse styles (border-white/10), and crisp, accessible data tables.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural layout and Shadcn heavily customized components for interactive forms, selects, and dialogs.
Avoid the 'God Agent' anti-pattern in UI design: visually break down AI actions into multiple specialized agents in the Agents tab, showing clear task handoffs.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Do not create 'AI slop' aesthetics.
Create depth through layered design elements with proper z-index hierarchy and glassmorphism.
Never apply universal transitions (e.g., transition: all). Target specific properties to avoid breaking transforms.
Never center-align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }).
Do not use AI assistant emoji characters (🤖🧠💭) for icons. Use lucide-react.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover, active, focus).
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical defaults.
Never use placeholder image URLs. Rely exclusively on the provided image list.
